hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.sh || "$f" == */bin/* || "$f" == install.sh ]]; then if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then shfmt -w "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck "$f" 2>&1; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
